timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.desc: Started as a small 20-seat restaurant in Koramangala, Bengaluru, by the Ruban family with just 8 dishes on the menu.

timeline.title: First Expansion
timeline.desc: Moved to a larger space on MG Road with 80 seats and added a dedicated private dining section for events.

timeline.title: Award Recognition
timeline.desc: Received "Best Indian Restaurant in Bengaluru" award from Food & Hospitality Excellence awards.

timeline.title: Digital & Delivery
timeline.desc: Launched online ordering, WhatsApp integration, and partnered with major delivery platforms.

timeline.title: Today & Beyond
timeline.desc: Serving 1000+ customers weekly, with a team of 45 people, and plans for a second location in 2025.

bookingFaq.q: How far in advance should I book?
bookingFaq.a: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially for weekends and special occasions.
No minimum spend for regular dining. Events packages start from ₹500 per person.

bookingFaq.q: Can I modify or cancel my booking?
bookingFaq.a: Yes, modifications or cancellations are accepted up to 4 hours before your reservation.

termsAndConditions: Offers cannot be combined with other promotions unless stated
Codes are single use per customer unless specified otherwise
Management reserves the right to modify or withdraw offers at any time
Offers valid for dine-in and takeaway unless marked otherwise
Minimum order amounts are inclusive of taxes
